member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.EventStoreActivityRestorer
member.summary: Restores the W3C TraceContext stored in event metadata so that downstream spans (projections, reactions) appear as children of the original write span.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.EventStoreActivityRestorer.RestoreFrom(JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.EventStoreMetadata,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new Activity linked to the trace that produced the event. Dispose the returned activity when processing is complete.
member.param: The event metadata containing the trace context.
The name of the operation for the new activity.
member.returns: A new Activity linked to the original trace, or a standalone Activity if.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.EventStoreMetadata
member.summary: Persisted as the KurrentDB event metadata blob. Combines business context (ExecutionContext) with the W3C TraceContext propagation fields needed by OpenTelemetry.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.CatchUp.KurrentDbAllStreamCatchUpSubscription.BuildFallbackSystemContext
member.summary: Builds a fallback system execution context for events that lack metadata (e.g., seeds, migrations).

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.CatchUp.KurrentDbAllStreamCatchUpSubscriptionOptions
member.summary: Full runtime options for the all-stream catch-up subscription. Non-bindable properties (FilterOptions, Credentials, ConfigureOperation) are configured in code. Bindable properties come from .

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.CatchUp.KurrentDbAllStreamCatchUpSubscriptionOptions.ApplySettings(JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.CatchUp.KurrentDbAllStreamCatchUpSubscriptionSettings)
member.summary: Applies bindable settings on top of the current options, overriding only the properties that settings exposes.
member.returns: The updated options instance for chaining.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.CatchUp.KurrentDbAllStreamCatchUpSubscriptionSettings
member.summary: Bindable settings for the all-stream catch-up subscription. These are read from configuration (e.g., appsettings.json) under the section defined by . Non-bindable options (FilterOptions, Credentials, etc.) are configured in code via .

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.CatchUp.KurrentDbAllStreamCatchUpSubscriptionSettings.SubscriptionId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this subscription. Defaults to a fixed GUID if not configured.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.CatchUp.KurrentDbAllStreamCatchUpSubscriptionSettings.ResolveLinkTos
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to resolve link events to their originals.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.CatchUp.KurrentDbAllStreamCatchUpSubscriptionSettings.IgnoreDeserializationErrors
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to silently skip events that fail deserialization instead of stopping the subscription.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.AllStreamPersistentSubscriptionBackgroundWorker
member.summary:
Background worker that manages the lifetime of the persistent subscription to the $all stream.
Lifecycle: 1. Calls SubscribeToAllAsync, which connects to KurrentDB and registers the event callback. The call returns as soon as the subscription is established; it does not block. 2. Waits indefinitely on the stoppingToken. The subscription delivers events via its own server-side callback mechanism (HandleEventCallbackAsync) while this task is parked. 3. When the host signals shutdown (stoppingToken cancelled), the Delay throws OperationCanceledException, ExecuteAsync returns, and BackgroundService disposes the subscription cleanly.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscription
member.summary:
Persistent subscription to the $all stream in KurrentDB using a consumer group pattern. Implements horizontal scalability where multiple instances can subscribe to the same group name.
Design: This implementation uses KurrentDB's native persistent subscription feature which: - Maintains state on the server (no client-side checkpoints needed) - Supports consumer groups for automatic event distribution - Enables horizontal scaling by distributing events among worker instances - Handles acknowledgment tracking automatically.
Failure handling: On event processing failure, a NACK with action Retry is sent. The server retries delivery up to times, after which it automatically parks the event to the dead-letter stream ($persistentsubscription-{groupName}-parked). No client-side retry counting is needed.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The service scope factory for creating scoped DI containers.

member.summary: Connects to the $all stream persistent subscription group and registers the event callback. Returns as soon as the subscription is established; the caller is responsible for keeping the process alive (see ).
member.param: The subscription options including group name and filters.
member.returns: A task that completes when the subscription is established.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscription.IsAlreadyExistsException(System.Exception)
member.summary: Detects whether an exception from indicates the group was already created by a concurrent instance (race condition on startup). KurrentDB surfaces this as an wrapping an with .
member.returns: True if the group already exists; otherwise false.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscription.EnrichActivity(System.Diagnostics.Activity,JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.EventStoreMetadata)
member.summary: Enriches the current Activity with correlation and tracing information from event metadata.
member.param: The Activity to enrich with tracing information.
The event metadata containing tracing context.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscription.IsSystemEvent(KurrentDB.Client.ResolvedEvent)
member.summary: Checks if an event is a system event (event type starts with $). System events should not be processed as domain events.
member.returns: True if the event is a system event; otherwise false.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscription.ConnectToGroupAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Establishes the initial connection to the persistent subscription group. Creates the group on KurrentDB if it does not exist yet.
member.returns: A task representing the connection operation.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscription.SubscribeToGroupAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempts to subscribe to the existing consumer group. If the group does not exist, creates it first and then retries the subscription. If creation races with another instance (group already exists), the exception is swallowed and the subscription is attempted directly.
member.returns: A task representing the subscribe-or-create-then-subscribe operation.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscription.CreateSubscriptionGroupAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates the persistent subscription group on KurrentDB for the $all stream. Uses the filter options from if provided. The is passed to the server so that KurrentDB automatically parks events after the configured number of failed delivery attempts, without requiring any client-side retry counting.
member.returns: A task representing the creation operation.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscription.HandleEventCallbackAsync(KurrentDB.Client.PersistentSubscription,KurrentDB.Client.ResolvedEvent,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Callback invoked when an event is available in the persistent subscription. On success, ACK is sent to advance the server-side position. On failure, NACK with action Retry is sent. The server retries up to times, then parks the event automatically. No client-side retry counting is required.
Deserialization failures: - If IgnoreDeserializationErrors is true, the event is ACK'd and skipped with a warning. Use this for schema evolution scenarios where unknown or malformed events are expected. - If IgnoreDeserializationErrors is false, the error propagates to NACK + retry. A deserialization failure in a single-context KurrentDB setup is always anomalous and should be surfaced, not silently swallowed.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscription.HandleSubscriptionDropped(KurrentDB.Client.PersistentSubscription,KurrentDB.Client.SubscriptionDroppedReason,System.Exception)
member.summary: Callback invoked when the persistent subscription is dropped by the server or due to an error. Marks the subscription as dropped and starts a background reconnect loop with exponential backoff. If the drop reason is (i.e. graceful host shutdown), no reconnect is attempted.
member.param: The exception that caused the drop, if any.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscription.ReconnectWithBackoffAsync(System.TimeSpan,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reconnects to the persistent subscription group with exponential backoff. Retries until the subscription is restored or the stopping token is cancelled.
member.param: The delay to wait before the first reconnect attempt.
member.returns: A task representing the reconnect loop.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscription.IsEventWithEmptyData(KurrentDB.Client.ResolvedEvent)
member.summary: Checks if an event has empty data (system event or tombstone).
member.returns: True if the event has empty data; otherwise false.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscription.BuildFallbackSystemContext
member.summary: Builds a fallback system execution context for events that lack metadata.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionOptions
member.summary: Options for configuring the persistent subscription to the $all stream in KurrentDB. Non-bindable properties (FilterOptions, Credentials, ConfigureOperation) are configured in code. Bindable properties come from .

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionOptions.GroupName
member.summary: Gets or sets the consumer group name. Multiple instances using the same group name will coordinate their event consumption via checkpoints. Default: "all-stream-group".

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionOptions.FilterOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets the filter options for filtering events on the server side before transmission.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionOptions.Credentials
member.summary: Gets or sets the credentials to use when connecting to KurrentDB.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionOptions.ResolveLinkTos
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to resolve link events to their target event data.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionOptions.BufferSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the buffer size for the persistent subscription channel. Determines how many messages can be buffered before being delivered to the subscriber. Default: 10.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionOptions.IgnoreDeserializationErrors
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to ignore deserialization errors and continue processing.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionOptions.MaxRetryCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of times the server will retry delivering a failed event before automatically parking it to the dead-letter stream ($persistentsubscription-{groupName}-parked). Parking is handled natively by KurrentDB; no client-side counting is required. Default: 5.
Applies bindable settings on top of the current options, overriding only the properties that settings exposes.
member.returns: The updated options instance for chaining.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionSettings
member.summary: Options for configuring the persistent subscription to the $all stream in KurrentDB.

member.name: F:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionSettings.Section
member.summary: The configuration section name for binding these options from configuration sources (e.g., appsettings.json).

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionSettings.GroupName
member.summary: Gets or sets the consumer group name. Multiple instances using the same group name will coordinate their event consumption via checkpoints. Default: "all-stream-group".

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionSettings.ResolveLinkTos
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to resolve link events to their target event data.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionSettings.BufferSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the buffer size for the persistent subscription channel. Determines how many messages can be buffered before being delivered to the subscriber. Default: 10.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionSettings.IgnoreDeserializationErrors
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to ignore deserialization errors and continue processing.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.KurrentDb.Subscriptions.Persistent.KurrentDbAllStreamPersistentSubscriptionSettings.MaxRetryCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of times the server will retry delivering a failed event before automatically parking it to the dead-letter stream ($persistentsubscription-{groupName}-parked). Parking is handled natively by KurrentDB; no client-side counting is required. Default: 5.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.EventStore.StreamNameMapper.ToStreamId(System.Type,System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Generates a stream id in the canonical `{category}-{aggregateId}` format. It can be expanded to the `{module}_{streamType}-{tenantId}_{aggregateId}` format.
member.param: The stream type based on aggregate type.
